subject: docs: fix freeform markdown description — always parsed, no toggle
body:
The markdown toggle was documented but never implemented. Freeform
mode always parses content as markdown (see AdCanvas.jsx:533).
Fixed in CLAUDE.md (3 locations), README.md, and USER_GUIDE.md.

Tags: docs, accuracy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
